channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Algorithm Optimization: Practical Big O Analysis: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut Algorithm Optimization: Practical Big O Analysis failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, an…

item.title: NULLs masquerading as zeros: why your analytics dashboards mislead you
item.description: Cut revenue KPI error by 15% by fixing NULLs masquerading as zeros in BigQuery and Looker. Learn the exact SQL pattern that silently corrupts analytics and the 3-step fix to stop misleading dashboards.

item.title: 13 ways to lock down your personal data from corporations in 2024
item.description: more than 5% of tests was rejected. 2. Per with lock down personal data — solve) I got an email in January 2024 that looked l.

item.title: 10 AI Tools That Replace Expensive Software: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut 10 AI Tools That Replace Expensive Software failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, and a s…

item.title: Why real-world object detection models fail on shelf images (and how to fix it)
item.description: Cut retail product detection errors by 70% with pose augmentation, context labels, and shelf normalization under real store conditions, achieving 89% mAP and 84% recall across 12 stores.

item.title: Why your FP code throws 'Cannot read property' with curried functions (and how to fix it)
item.description: Reduce 'Cannot read property' errors in FP pipelines by 70% with Ramda and Lodash curry fixes — arity checks, compose chains, and transpiler pitfalls revealed. Improve functional code reliability with 4 concrete fixes.

item.title: Full-Stack Development in 2026: The Best Stack: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut Full-Stack Development in 2026: The Best Stack failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, and …

item.title: DDoS Mitigation is Broken — Here’s What Actually Works
item.description: Cut DDoS response time by 70% and save $12k/month with edge state reduction — why scrubbing alone fails on WebSockets, gRPC, and databases, plus real attack case studies and code examples.

item.title: The 11 quantum SDKs and tools every software engineer should try in 2025
item.description: Cut cloud quantum runtime by 85% and shrink mobile APK bloat to 5 MB with PennyLane 0.36 — the full ranked list of 11 quantum SDKs tested on AWS Braket, IBM Quantum, and 4G mobile connections for software engineers who need reliability over fibre.

item.title: Why my no-code AI analysis tool returned garbage (and how to fix it)
item.description: Cut analysis time from hours to minutes with no-code AI — but only if you avoid these 3 silent killers: non-determinism, data leakage, and row limits. Benchmarks, Python audits, and budget tiers for $20 droplets vs Series B startups.

item.title: CI/CD pipelines that actually catch bugs — the ones teams copy
item.description: Cut production incidents by 76% with CI/CD pipelines that run unit tests on PRs, integration tests on merge, and 10-minute canaries with traffic-based gates before 100% rollout — the exact setup teams copy in 2025

item.title: No-code vs code finally explained
item.description: Validate SaaS ideas in 8 hours with no-code, then migrate to code once you hit 50 paying users to cut page load from 2.4 s to 380 ms and monthly bills from $190 to $12.

item.title: Pick the Right AI Coding Assistant in 5 Minutes
item.description: Compare Cursor vs Copilot vs Codeium vs Continue in 5 minutes: first snippet latency, prompt drift, and memory leaks measured on real code. Pick the assistant that actually ships faster.

item.title: 9 SRE principles that cut outages by 60% — ranked by impact
item.description: Cut outages by 60% using 9 ranked SRE principles — error budgets, p99 latency, alert discipline, and more with concrete benchmarks and code examples.

item.title: Build a CLI calculator in Rust under 2 hours
item.description: Build CLI calculator Rust: that’s a 30% improvement over the default. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Generative AI and Large Language Models Explained: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut Generative AI and Large Language Models Explained failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, a…

item.title: 11 Real-World Auth Patterns Tested in 2024
item.description: Cut authentication latency to 112 ms p95 and keep costs under $50/month with these 11 real-world auth patterns tested on a $40 Vultr VPS in Frankfurt.

item.title: The 10 pivotal moments that made Stripe the internet’s payment layer
item.description: Ship payments in an hour with Stripe’s 2.9% fee and 120 ms latency — idempotency keys, Connect marketplaces, and webhooks that don’t disappear

item.title: Build a real-time chat app with WebSockets and Flask in 30 minutes
item.description: Build a real-time chat app with WebSockets and Flask in 30 minutes — 68 ms median latency, $0.05/user/month, no AWS bill required

item.title: How 4-Day Weeks Cut Outage Time by 37% Without Losing Velocity
item.description: Cut mean time to recovery by 37% with a 4-day work week — incident metrics from a live Go microservice show MTTR dropped from 2h to 1h 12m without sacrificing velocity or SLOs.
